notableEvents.label: Michael Busch plunked
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch hit by pitch. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Carson Kelly to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kevin Alcántara GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kevin Alcántara grounds into a double play, third baseman José Fermín to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd. Kevin Alcántara out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman José Fermín. Michael Busch scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Dansby Swanson to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman José Fermín.
